description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring large glass windows and multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The structure includes a main living area, a detached garage, and an outdoor leisure space with a uniquely shaped swimming pool, sun loungers, and umbrellas. A prominent pink-blossomed tree and a green hedge add landscaping elements to the property. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray, with some wooden accents and extensive use of glass for natural lighting. The house has multiple entry points, visible doors, and a rooftop terrace. The overall layout is open and spacious, with a focus on outdoor living and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a detached garage, and an outdoor pool area, surrounded by minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, detached garage, pink-blossomed tree, and the full width of the house.
description_view_1: View highlighting the pool, sun loungers, umbrellas, and the rear facade with large windows and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, connecting walkway, and the elongated structure of the bungalow with garage and terrace.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the garage, rooftop terrace, and landscaping elements like the hedge and tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
